+"""Repository for promoted Pack Store archive assets."""
+
+import logging
+
+from favie_common.database.mongo_client import mongo
+
+from app.database.collections import PACK_ASSET_COLLECTION
+from app.schema.pack_test import PackAsset
+
+logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
+_PUBLIC_PROJECTION = {"_id": 0}
+
+
+async def create(asset: PackAsset) -> None:
+    await mongo.create(PACK_ASSET_COLLECTION, asset.model_dump(mode="python"))
+
+
+async def get_by_id(asset_id: str) -> PackAsset | None:
+    doc = await mongo.read_one(PACK_ASSET_COLLECTION, {"asset_id": asset_id}, projection=_PUBLIC_PROJECTION)
+    return PackAsset.model_validate(doc) if doc else None
+
+
+async def get_by_source_test_run(source_test_run_id: str) -> PackAsset | None:
+    doc = await mongo.read_one(
+        PACK_ASSET_COLLECTION,
+        {"source_test_run_id": source_test_run_id, "status": "active"},
+        projection=_PUBLIC_PROJECTION,
+    )
+    return PackAsset.model_validate(doc) if doc else None
+
+
+async def ensure_indexes() -> None:
+    coll = mongo.db[PACK_ASSET_COLLECTION]
+    try:
+        await coll.create_index("asset_id", unique=True, name="unique_asset_id")
+        await coll.create_index([("org_id", 1), ("pack_id", 1), ("created_at", -1)], name="idx_org_pack_created")
+        await coll.create_index(
+            "source_test_run_id",
+            unique=True,
+            sparse=True,
+            name="unique_source_test_run_id",
+        )
+        logger.info("[STARTUP] Ensured indexes on %s", PACK_ASSET_COLLECTION)
+    except Exception as exc:
+        logger.warning("[STARTUP] Could not ensure indexes on %s: %s", PACK_ASSET_COLLECTION, exc)

+"""Repository for the ``ecap-pack-test-runs`` collection."""
+
+import logging
+from datetime import datetime
+from typing import Any
+
+from favie_common.database.mongo_client import mongo
+from pymongo import ReturnDocument
+
+from app.database.collections import PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION
+from app.schema.pack_test import PackTestRun
+
+logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
+_PUBLIC_PROJECTION = {"_id": 0}
+
+
+async def create(run: PackTestRun) -> None:
+    await mongo.create(PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION, run.model_dump(mode="python"))
+
+
+async def get_by_id(org_id: str, test_run_id: str) -> PackTestRun | None:
+    doc = await mongo.read_one(
+        PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION,
+        {"org_id": org_id, "test_run_id": test_run_id},
+        projection=_PUBLIC_PROJECTION,
+    )
+    return PackTestRun.model_validate(doc) if doc else None
+
+
+async def get_by_id_any_org(test_run_id: str) -> PackTestRun | None:
+    doc = await mongo.read_one(
+        PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION,
+        {"test_run_id": test_run_id},
+        projection=_PUBLIC_PROJECTION,
+    )
+    return PackTestRun.model_validate(doc) if doc else None
+
+
+async def update_fields(org_id: str, test_run_id: str, fields: dict[str, Any]) -> int:
+    result = await mongo.db[PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION].update_one(
+        {"org_id": org_id, "test_run_id": test_run_id},
+        {"$set": fields},
+    )
+    return result.modified_count
+
+
+async def transition_status(
+    *,
+    org_id: str,
+    test_run_id: str,
+    from_statuses: set[str],
+    to_status: str,
+    fields: dict[str, Any],
+) -> PackTestRun | None:
+    doc = await mongo.find_one_and_update(
+        PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION,
+        {"org_id": org_id, "test_run_id": test_run_id, "status": {"$in": sorted(from_statuses)}},
+        {"$set": {**fields, "status": to_status}},
+        return_document=True,
+    )
+    return PackTestRun.model_validate(doc) if doc else None
+
+
+async def claim_reusable_runtime(
+    *,
+    org_id: str,
+    created_by_uid: str,
+    pack_name: str,
+    display_id: str,
+    pack_version: str,
+    now: datetime,
+    cleanup_started_at: datetime,
+) -> PackTestRun | None:
+    """Atomically detach one reusable temp runtime from the latest prior candidate run."""
+    doc = await mongo.db[PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION].find_one_and_update(
+        {
+            "org_id": org_id,
+            "created_by_uid": created_by_uid,
+            "pack_name": pack_name,
+            "display_id": display_id,
+            "pack_version": pack_version,
+            "status": {"$in": ["ready_for_preview", "previewing", "timed_out"]},
+            "cleanup_after": {"$gt": now},
+            "temp_uid": {"$nin": [None, ""]},
+            "temp_bot_id": {"$nin": [None, ""]},
+            "temp_computer_id": {"$nin": [None, ""]},
+            "temp_mm_channel_id": {"$nin": [None, ""]},
+            "temp_mm_bot_user_id": {"$nin": [None, ""]},
+        },
+        {
+            "$set": {
+                "status": "cleanup_pending",
+                "failure_code": "superseded_by_new_upload",
+                "failure_summary": "A newer Pack Test upload superseded this test run",
+                "cleanup_started_at": cleanup_started_at,
+                "updated_at": now,
+                "temp_uid": None,
+                "temp_bot_id": None,
+                "temp_computer_id": None,
+                "temp_agent_id": None,
+                "temp_mm_channel_id": None,
+                "temp_mm_bot_user_id": None,
+            }
+        },
+        sort=[("created_at", -1)],
+        projection=_PUBLIC_PROJECTION,
+        return_document=ReturnDocument.BEFORE,
+    )
+    return PackTestRun.model_validate(doc) if doc else None
+
+
+async def attach_submission(org_id: str, test_run_id: str, submission_id: str, updated_at: datetime) -> int:
+    return await update_fields(
+        org_id,
+        test_run_id,
+        {"submission_id": submission_id, "updated_at": updated_at},
+    )
+
+
+async def list_by_candidate(
+    *,
+    org_id: str,
+    created_by_uid: str,
+    pack_name: str,
+    display_id: str,
+    pack_version: str,
+    limit: int = 20,
+) -> list[PackTestRun]:
+    cursor = (
+        mongo.db[PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION]
+        .find(
+            {
+                "org_id": org_id,
+                "created_by_uid": created_by_uid,
+                "pack_name": pack_name,
+                "display_id": display_id,
+                "pack_version": pack_version,
+            },
+            projection=_PUBLIC_PROJECTION,
+        )
+        .sort("created_at", -1)
+        .limit(limit)
+    )
+    docs = await cursor.to_list(length=limit)
+    return [PackTestRun.model_validate(doc) for doc in docs]
+
+
+async def list_cleanup_due(now: datetime, limit: int) -> list[PackTestRun]:
+    cursor = (
+        mongo.db[PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION]
+        .find(
+            {
+                "$or": [
+                    {"status": "cleanup_pending"},
+                    {"status": {"$in": ["failed", "timed_out"]}, "cleanup_after": {"$lte": now}},
+                    {"status": {"$in": ["ready_for_preview", "previewing"]}, "preview_expires_at": {"$lte": now}},
+                    {"status": "promoted", "submission_id": {"$nin": [None, ""]}},
+                ]
+            },
+            projection=_PUBLIC_PROJECTION,
+        )
+        .sort("updated_at", 1)
+        .limit(limit)
+    )
+    docs = await cursor.to_list(length=limit)
+    return [PackTestRun.model_validate(doc) for doc in docs]
+
+
+async def ensure_indexes() -> None:
+    coll = mongo.db[PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION]
+    try:
+        await coll.create_index("test_run_id", unique=True, name="unique_test_run_id")
+        await coll.create_index(
+            [("org_id", 1), ("created_by_uid", 1), ("created_at", -1)],
+            name="idx_org_creator_created",
+        )
+        await coll.create_index(
+            [
+                ("org_id", 1),
+                ("created_by_uid", 1),
+                ("pack_name", 1),
+                ("display_id", 1),
+                ("pack_version", 1),
+                ("created_at", -1),
+            ],
+            name="idx_candidate_lookup",
+        )
+        await coll.create_index([("org_id", 1), ("status", 1), ("updated_at", -1)], name="idx_org_status_updated")
+        await coll.create_index([("cleanup_after", 1), ("status", 1)], name="idx_cleanup_after_status")
+        await coll.create_index("promoted_asset_id", sparse=True, name="idx_promoted_asset_id")
+        logger.info("[STARTUP] Ensured indexes on %s", PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION)
+    except Exception as exc:
+        logger.warning("[STARTUP] Could not ensure indexes on %s: %s", PACK_TEST_RUN_COLLECTION, exc)

+"""Org-scoped Agent Studio Pack Test routes."""
+
+from fastapi import APIRouter, BackgroundTasks, Depends, Request
+
+from app.middleware.org import require_active_org_member, require_matching_current_org
+from app.schema.account_org import AccountOrg
+from app.schema.pack_test import (
+    PackAssetPromoteRequest,
+    PackAssetPromoteResponse,
+    PackTestPreviewSession,
+    PackTestRun,
+    PackTestRunActionRequest,
+    PackTestRunCreateRequest,
+    PackTestRunCreateResponse,
+)
+from app.services.pack_store import pack_test_service
+from app.services.pack_store.archive_service import validate_uploaded_archive_reference
+from app.services.pack_store.pack_test_runtime_service import cleanup_test_run, install_test_run
+
+router = APIRouter(prefix="/orgs/{org_id}", tags=["pack-test-runs"])
+
+
+def _bearer_token_from_request(request: Request) -> str:
+    authorization = request.headers.get("authorization", "")
+    scheme, _, token = authorization.partition(" ")
+    if scheme.lower() != "bearer":
+        return ""
+    return token.strip()
+
+
+@router.post("/pack-test-runs", status_code=201, response_model=PackTestRunCreateResponse)
+async def create_pack_test_run_handler(
+    org_id: str,
+    request: PackTestRunCreateRequest,
+    background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
+    http_request: Request,
+    membership: AccountOrg = Depends(require_active_org_member),
+) -> PackTestRunCreateResponse:
+    validated_archive = validate_uploaded_archive_reference(
+        org_id=org_id,
+        display_id=request.display_id,
+        archive_key=request.archive.key,
+        archive_name=request.archive.name,
+        content_type=request.archive.content_type,
+        size=request.archive.size,
+        sha256=request.archive.sha256,
+        manifest_name=request.archive.manifest_name,
+        manifest_version=request.archive.manifest_version,
+        expected_pack_name=request.pack_name,
+        expected_pack_version=request.pack_version,
+    )
+    response = await pack_test_service.create_test_run(
+        org_id=org_id,
+        created_by_uid=membership.uid,
+        pack_name=request.pack_name,
+        display_id=request.display_id,
+        pack_version=request.pack_version,
+        listing_metadata=request.listing_metadata,
+        quick_commands=request.quick_commands,
+        smoke_scenarios=request.smoke_scenarios,
+        archive=validated_archive,
+    )
+    if not response.reused:
+        background_tasks.add_task(
+            install_test_run,
+            response.test_run_id,
+            archive_read_token=_bearer_token_from_request(http_request),
+        )
+    for superseded_test_run_id in response.superseded_test_run_ids:
+        background_tasks.add_task(
+            cleanup_test_run,
+            org_id,
+            superseded_test_run_id,
+            reason="superseded_by_new_upload",
+        )
+    return response
+
+
+@router.get("/pack-test-runs/{test_run_id}", response_model=PackTestRun)
+async def get_pack_test_run_handler(
+    org_id: str,
+    test_run_id: str,
+    membership: AccountOrg = Depends(require_active_org_member),
+) -> PackTestRun:
+    return await pack_test_service.get_test_run(org_id=org_id, test_run_id=test_run_id, requester_uid=membership.uid)
+
+
+@router.get("/pack-test-runs/{test_run_id}/preview-session", response_model=PackTestPreviewSession)
+async def get_pack_test_preview_session_handler(
+    org_id: str,
+    test_run_id: str,
+    membership: AccountOrg = Depends(require_active_org_member),
+) -> PackTestPreviewSession:
+    return await pack_test_service.get_preview_session(
+        org_id=org_id,
+        test_run_id=test_run_id,
+        requester_uid=membership.uid,
+    )
+
+
+@router.post("/pack-test-runs/{test_run_id}/accept", response_model=PackTestRun)
+async def accept_pack_test_run_handler(
+    org_id: str,
+    test_run_id: str,
+    request: PackTestRunActionRequest,
+    membership: AccountOrg = Depends(require_active_org_member),
+) -> PackTestRun:
+    return await pack_test_service.accept_test_run(
+        org_id=org_id,
+        test_run_id=test_run_id,
+        requester_uid=membership.uid,
+        note=request.note,
+    )
+
+
+@router.post("/pack-test-runs/{test_run_id}/extend-preview", response_model=PackTestRun)
+async def extend_pack_test_run_handler(
+    org_id: str,
+    test_run_id: str,
+    membership: AccountOrg = Depends(require_active_org_member),
+) -> PackTestRun:
+    return await pack_test_service.extend_preview(org_id=org_id, test_run_id=test_run_id, requester_uid=membership.uid)
+
+
+@router.post("/packs/{pack_id}/assets/promote", response_model=PackAssetPromoteResponse)
+async def promote_pack_test_asset_handler(
+    org_id: str,
+    pack_id: str,
+    request: PackAssetPromoteRequest,
+    membership: AccountOrg = Depends(require_matching_current_org),
+) -> PackAssetPromoteResponse:
+    return await pack_test_service.promote_test_run_asset(
+        org_id=org_id,
+        pack_id=pack_id,
+        test_run_id=request.test_run_id,
+        requester_uid=membership.uid,
+    )

+"""Schemas for Agent Studio Pack Test runs and promoted Pack assets."""
+
+from datetime import datetime
+from typing import Any, Literal
+
+from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
+
+PackTestRunStatus = Literal[
+    "created",
+    "asset_received",
+    "bot_allocating",
+    "installing",
+    "ready_for_preview",
+    "previewing",
+    "accepted",
+    "promoted",
+    "cleanup_pending",
+    "cleaned",
+    "failed",
+    "timed_out",
+]
+
+PackAssetStatus = Literal["active", "deleted"]
+
+
+class PackTestRun(BaseModel):
+    test_run_id: str
+    org_id: str
+    created_by_uid: str
+
+    pack_name: str
+    display_id: str
+    pack_version: str
+    listing_metadata: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)
+    quick_commands: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
+    smoke_scenarios: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
+
+    archive_tmp_key: str
+    archive_name: str
+    archive_ext: str
+    archive_size: int
+    archive_sha256: str
+    archive_content_type: str
+
+    temp_uid: str | None = None
+    temp_bot_id: str | None = None
+    temp_computer_id: str | None = None
+    temp_agent_id: str | None = None
+    temp_mm_channel_id: str | None = None
+    temp_mm_bot_user_id: str | None = None
+
+    status: PackTestRunStatus
+    failure_code: str | None = None
+    failure_summary: str | None = None
+
+    preview_url: str | None = None
+    preview_expires_at: datetime | None = None
+    preview_extended_count: int = 0
+
+    accepted_at: datetime | None = None
+    accepted_by_uid: str | None = None
+    acceptance_note: str | None = None
+
+    promoted_asset_id: str | None = None
+    submission_id: str | None = None
+
+    cleanup_after: datetime
+    cleanup_started_at: datetime | None = None
+    cleaned_at: datetime | None = None
+    cleanup_error: str | None = None
+    created_at: datetime
+    updated_at: datetime
+
+
+class PackTestUploadedArchive(BaseModel):
+    key: str = Field(min_length=1)
+    name: str = Field(min_length=1)
+    size: int = Field(gt=0)
+    sha256: str = Field(pattern=r"^[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$")
+    content_type: str = ""
+    manifest_name: str = Field(min_length=1)
+    manifest_version: str = Field(min_length=1)
+
+
+class PackTestRunCreateRequest(BaseModel):
+    pack_name: str = Field(min_length=1)
+    display_id: str = Field(min_length=1)
+    pack_version: str = Field(min_length=1)
+    archive: PackTestUploadedArchive
+    listing_metadata: dict[str, Any] = Field(default_factory=dict)
+    quick_commands: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
+    smoke_scenarios: list[dict[str, Any]] = Field(default_factory=list)
+
+
+class PackAsset(BaseModel):
+    asset_id: str
+    org_id: str
+    pack_id: str
+    source_test_run_id: str
+    storage_key: str
+    archive_name: str
+    archive_ext: str
+    archive_size: int
+    archive_sha256: str
+    content_type: str
+    status: PackAssetStatus
+    created_by_uid: str
+    created_at: datetime
+    deleted_at: datetime | None = None
+
+
+class PackTestRunCreateResponse(BaseModel):
+    test_run_id: str
+    org_id: str
+    status: PackTestRunStatus
+    archive_sha256: str
+    preview_url: str | None = None
+    created_at: datetime
+    reused: bool = False
+    superseded_test_run_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
+
+
+class PackTestRunActionRequest(BaseModel):
+    note: str | None = None
+
+
+class PackTestPreviewSession(BaseModel):
+    test_run_id: str
+    token: str
+    user_id: str
+    channel_id: str
+    agent_id: str
+    bot_user_id: str
+    bot_name: str
+    expires_at: datetime
+
+
+class PackAssetPromoteRequest(BaseModel):
+    test_run_id: str = Field(min_length=1)
+
+
+class PackAssetPromoteResponse(BaseModel):
+    asset_id: str
+    archive_sha256: str
+    source_test_run_id: str

+"""Archive deployment helpers for agent packs."""
+
+import posixpath
+import textwrap
+from urllib.parse import urlparse
+
+from app.errors import DomainValidationError
+from app.services.computer.official_agent_pack_deploy_script import OFFICIAL_AGENT_PACK_DEPLOY_SCRIPT
+from app.services.openclaw.agent_runtime import ArchiveRuntimeSource, runtime_exec_checked
+
+
+async def deploy_official_agent_pack_archive(
+    computer_id: str,
+    app_token: str,
+    agent_id: str,
+    workspace_dir: str,
+    archive_source: ArchiveRuntimeSource,
+    *,
+    archive_read_token: str | None = None,
+    overwrite_mode: str = "preserve",
+) -> None:
+    """Deploy official agent pack files with a Python runtime script."""
+    source_type = str(archive_source.get("archive_source_type") or "").strip().lower()
+    source_locator = str(archive_source.get("source_locator") or "").strip()
+    if not source_type or not source_locator:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="openclaw.agent_runtime.invalid_archive_source",
+            detail="archive source type and locator are required",
+        )
+    if overwrite_mode not in {"preserve", "clean"}:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="openclaw.agent_runtime.invalid_overwrite_mode",
+            detail="archive overwrite mode must be preserve or clean",
+        )
+
+    archive_name = (
+        str(archive_source.get("archive_name") or "").strip()
+        or posixpath.basename(urlparse(source_locator).path if source_type == "remote_url" else source_locator)
+        or f"{agent_id}.zip"
+    )
+    env_args = [
+        "env",
+        f"ARCHIVE_AGENT_ID={agent_id}",
+        f"ARCHIVE_SOURCE_TYPE={source_type}",
+        f"ARCHIVE_SOURCE_LOCATOR={source_locator}",
+        f"ARCHIVE_NAME={archive_name}",
+        f"ARCHIVE_WORKSPACE_DIR={workspace_dir}",
+    ]
+    if archive_read_token:
+        env_args.append(f"ARCHIVE_READ_TOKEN={archive_read_token}")
+    if overwrite_mode != "preserve":
+        env_args.append(f"ARCHIVE_OVERWRITE_MODE={overwrite_mode}")
+
+    await runtime_exec_checked(
+        computer_id,
+        app_token,
+        [*env_args, "python3", "-c", textwrap.dedent(OFFICIAL_AGENT_PACK_DEPLOY_SCRIPT).strip()],
+        default_error_status=500,
+        workspace_missing_status=400,
+    )

+"""Archive validation and R2 storage helpers for Pack Test runs."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import hashlib
+import posixpath
+import tarfile
+import zipfile
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from io import BytesIO
+from pathlib import PurePosixPath
+
+from app.errors import DomainValidationError
+
+MAX_PACK_TEST_ARCHIVE_BYTES = 100 * 1024 * 1024
+SUPPORTED_ARCHIVE_EXTENSIONS = (".tar.gz", ".zip")
+REQUIRED_ROOT_FILES = ("agent-pack.yaml", "AGENTS.md", "SOUL.md", "IDENTITY.md")
+FORBIDDEN_TOP_LEVEL_DIRS = ("agent", "skills", "package")
+_MIN_QUOTED_SCALAR_LENGTH = 2
+_SHA256_HEX_LENGTH = 64
+_HEX_DIGITS = set("0123456789abcdefABCDEF")
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class ValidatedArchive:
+    data: bytes
+    archive_name: str
+    archive_ext: str
+    size: int
+    sha256: str
+    content_type: str
+    manifest_name: str
+    manifest_version: str
+
+
+@dataclass(frozen=True)
+class UploadedArchiveReference:
+    archive_key: str
+    archive_name: str
+    archive_ext: str
+    size: int
+    sha256: str
+    content_type: str
+    manifest_name: str
+    manifest_version: str
+
+
+def _archive_ext(filename: str) -> str:
+    lowered = filename.strip().lower()
+    for ext in SUPPORTED_ARCHIVE_EXTENSIONS:
+        if lowered.endswith(ext):
+            return ext
+    raise DomainValidationError(
+        code="pack_test.archive_unsupported",
+        detail="Pack test archive must be .tar.gz or .zip",
+    )
+
+
+def _default_content_type(archive_ext: str) -> str:
+    return "application/zip" if archive_ext == ".zip" else "application/gzip"
+
+
+def _safe_member_path(name: str, *, code: str) -> str:
+    normalized = posixpath.normpath(name)
+    path = PurePosixPath(normalized)
+    if path.is_absolute() or ".." in path.parts or normalized in {"", "."}:
+        raise DomainValidationError(code=code, detail="Archive contains an unsafe path")
+    return normalized
+
+
+def _validate_layout(names: list[str], *, manifest_text: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
+    root_files = {name for name in names if "/" not in name}
+    missing = [required for required in REQUIRED_ROOT_FILES if required not in root_files]
+    if missing:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_layout_invalid",
+            detail="Pack archive is missing required root files",
+            context={"missing": missing},
+        )
+
+    forbidden = sorted(
+        {name.split("/", 1)[0] for name in names if "/" in name and name.split("/", 1)[0] in FORBIDDEN_TOP_LEVEL_DIRS}
+    )
+    if forbidden:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_layout_invalid",
+            detail="Pack archive contains forbidden top-level directories",
+            context={"forbidden": forbidden},
+        )
+
+    manifest_name = _extract_manifest_field(manifest_text, "name")
+    manifest_version = _extract_manifest_field(manifest_text, "version")
+    if not manifest_name or not manifest_version:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_manifest_invalid",
+            detail="agent-pack.yaml must include top-level name and version",
+        )
+    return manifest_name, manifest_version
+
+
+def _extract_manifest_field(manifest_text: str, field: str) -> str:
+    prefix = f"{field}:"
+    for line in manifest_text.splitlines():
+        stripped = line.strip()
+        if not stripped.startswith(prefix):
+            continue
+        value = stripped[len(prefix) :].strip()
+        if "#" in value:
+            value = value.split("#", 1)[0].strip()
+        for quote in ('"', "'"):
+            if len(value) >= _MIN_QUOTED_SCALAR_LENGTH and value.startswith(quote) and value.endswith(quote):
+                return value[1:-1].strip()
+        return value.strip()
+    return ""
+
+
+def _validate_zip(data: bytes) -> tuple[str, str]:
+    try:
+        with zipfile.ZipFile(BytesIO(data)) as archive:
+            normalized_names: list[str] = []
+            manifest_text = ""
+            for info in archive.infolist():
+                if info.is_dir():
+                    continue
+                normalized = _safe_member_path(info.filename, code="pack_test.archive_zip_unsafe")
+                normalized_names.append(normalized)
+                if normalized == "agent-pack.yaml":
+                    manifest_text = archive.read(info).decode("utf-8")
+    except UnicodeDecodeError as exc:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_manifest_invalid",
+            detail="agent-pack.yaml must be valid UTF-8",
+        ) from exc
+    except zipfile.BadZipFile as exc:
+        raise DomainValidationError(code="pack_test.archive_invalid", detail="Archive is not a valid zip file") from exc
+
+    return _validate_layout(normalized_names, manifest_text=manifest_text)
+
+
+def _validate_tar(data: bytes) -> tuple[str, str]:
+    try:
+        with tarfile.open(fileobj=BytesIO(data), mode="r:*") as archive:
+            normalized_names: list[str] = []
+            manifest_text = ""
+            for info in archive.getmembers():
+                if not (info.isfile() or info.isdir()):
+                    raise DomainValidationError(
+                        code="pack_test.archive_tar_unsafe",
+                        detail="Archive may contain only regular files and directories",
+                    )
+                if info.isdir():
+                    continue
+                normalized = _safe_member_path(info.name, code="pack_test.archive_tar_unsafe")
+                normalized_names.append(normalized)
+                if normalized == "agent-pack.yaml":
+                    extracted = archive.extractfile(info)
+                    manifest_text = extracted.read().decode("utf-8") if extracted else ""
+    except UnicodeDecodeError as exc:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_manifest_invalid",
+            detail="agent-pack.yaml must be valid UTF-8",
+        ) from exc
+    except tarfile.TarError as exc:
+        raise DomainValidationError(code="pack_test.archive_invalid", detail="Archive is not a valid tar file") from exc
+
+    return _validate_layout(normalized_names, manifest_text=manifest_text)
+
+
+def validate_archive_upload(
+    *,
+    filename: str,
+    content_type: str,
+    data: bytes,
+    expected_pack_name: str,
+    expected_pack_version: str,
+) -> ValidatedArchive:
+    archive_name = posixpath.basename(filename.strip())
+    archive_ext = _archive_ext(archive_name)
+    if len(data) > MAX_PACK_TEST_ARCHIVE_BYTES:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_too_large",
+            detail="Pack test archive is too large",
+            context={"max_bytes": MAX_PACK_TEST_ARCHIVE_BYTES},
+        )
+
+    manifest_name, manifest_version = _validate_zip(data) if archive_ext == ".zip" else _validate_tar(data)
+    if manifest_name != expected_pack_name:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_manifest_mismatch",
+            detail="agent-pack.yaml name does not match request pack_name",
+            context={"manifest_name": manifest_name, "pack_name": expected_pack_name},
+        )
+    if manifest_version != expected_pack_version:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_manifest_mismatch",
+            detail="agent-pack.yaml version does not match request pack_version",
+            context={"manifest_version": manifest_version, "pack_version": expected_pack_version},
+        )
+
+    return ValidatedArchive(
+        data=data,
+        archive_name=archive_name,
+        archive_ext=archive_ext,
+        size=len(data),
+        sha256=hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest(),
+        content_type=content_type or _default_content_type(archive_ext),
+        manifest_name=manifest_name,
+        manifest_version=manifest_version,
+    )
+
+
+def _require_single_path_segment(value: str, *, field_name: str) -> str:
+    segment = value.strip()
+    if not segment or "/" in segment:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_upload_invalid_field",
+            detail=f"{field_name} must be a single path segment",
+            context={"field": field_name},
+        )
+    return segment
+
+
+def _safe_object_key(value: str) -> str:
+    key = value.strip()
+    normalized = posixpath.normpath(key)
+    path = PurePosixPath(normalized)
+    if path.is_absolute() or ".." in path.parts or normalized in {"", "."} or normalized != key:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_key_invalid",
+            detail="Uploaded archive key is invalid",
+        )
+    return normalized
+
+
+def _require_sha256(value: str) -> str:
+    sha256 = value.strip()
+    if len(sha256) != _SHA256_HEX_LENGTH or any(ch not in _HEX_DIGITS for ch in sha256):
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_hash_invalid",
+            detail="Uploaded archive sha256 must be a 64-character hex string",
+        )
+    return sha256.lower()
+
+
+def validate_uploaded_archive_reference(
+    *,
+    org_id: str,
+    display_id: str,
+    archive_key: str,
+    archive_name: str,
+    content_type: str,
+    size: int,
+    sha256: str,
+    manifest_name: str,
+    manifest_version: str,
+    expected_pack_name: str,
+    expected_pack_version: str,
+) -> UploadedArchiveReference:
+    display_segment = _require_single_path_segment(display_id, field_name="display_id")
+    key = _safe_object_key(archive_key)
+    expected_prefix = f"{org_id}/{display_segment}/"
+    if not key.startswith(expected_prefix):
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_key_scope_mismatch",
+            detail="Uploaded archive key does not belong to this org and pack",
+            context={"expected_prefix": expected_prefix},
+        )
+
+    name = posixpath.basename(archive_name.strip())
+    archive_ext = _archive_ext(name)
+    key_ext = _archive_ext(key)
+    if key_ext != archive_ext:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_extension_mismatch",
+            detail="Uploaded archive key extension does not match archive name",
+            context={"archive_ext": archive_ext, "key_ext": key_ext},
+        )
+    if size > MAX_PACK_TEST_ARCHIVE_BYTES:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_too_large",
+            detail="Pack test archive is too large",
+            context={"max_bytes": MAX_PACK_TEST_ARCHIVE_BYTES},
+        )
+    if manifest_name != expected_pack_name:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_manifest_mismatch",
+            detail="agent-pack.yaml name does not match request pack_name",
+            context={"manifest_name": manifest_name, "pack_name": expected_pack_name},
+        )
+    if manifest_version != expected_pack_version:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.archive_manifest_mismatch",
+            detail="agent-pack.yaml version does not match request pack_version",
+            context={"manifest_version": manifest_version, "pack_version": expected_pack_version},
+        )
+
+    return UploadedArchiveReference(
+        archive_key=key,
+        archive_name=name,
+        archive_ext=archive_ext,
+        size=size,
+        sha256=_require_sha256(sha256),
+        content_type=content_type or _default_content_type(archive_ext),
+        manifest_name=manifest_name,
+        manifest_version=manifest_version,
+    )

+"""Cleanup lifecycle for Pack Test temporary runtimes."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import logging
+import time
+from datetime import UTC, datetime
+
+from app.database import agent_workspace_repo, computer_repo, pack_test_run_repo, warm_pool_assets_repo, warm_pool_repo
+from app.schema.cron import CronResult
+from app.schema.pack_test import PackTestRun
+from app.services.openclaw.bot_lifecycle import get_first_asset_bot
+from app.services.openclaw_client import get_openclaw_client
+from app.services.r2_storage import get_r2_client
+
+logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
+
+
+def _now() -> datetime:
+    return datetime.now(UTC)
+
+
+def _now_ts() -> int:
+    return int(time.time())
+
+
+def _as_utc(value: datetime) -> datetime:
+    if value.tzinfo is None or value.tzinfo.utcoffset(value) is None:
+        return value.replace(tzinfo=UTC)
+    return value.astimezone(UTC)
+
+
+def _failure_summary(exc: BaseException, *, max_chars: int = 2000) -> str:
+    message = str(exc)
+    if len(message) <= max_chars:
+        return message
+    head = max_chars // 4
+    tail = max_chars - head - 40
+    return f"{message[:head]}\n... <truncated {len(message) - head - tail} chars> ...\n{message[-tail:]}"
+
+
+def _app_token_from_assets(assets: dict) -> str:
+    app_token = str(assets.get("app_token") or "").strip()
+    if app_token:
+        return app_token
+    app = assets.get("openclaw_app")
+    if isinstance(app, dict):
+        return str(app.get("api_token") or "").strip()
+    return ""
+
+
+async def _cleanup_materialized_runtime(run: PackTestRun) -> None:
+    if not run.temp_computer_id:
+        return
+    now_iso = _now().isoformat()
+    await computer_repo.soft_delete_by_uid_and_computer_ids(run.created_by_uid, {run.temp_computer_id})
+    await agent_workspace_repo.update_fields(
+        run.created_by_uid,
+        run.org_id,
+        run.temp_computer_id,
+        run.temp_agent_id or "main",
+        {"status": "deleted", "deleted_at": now_iso, "updated_at": now_iso},
+    )
+
+
+async def _discard_temp_uid(uid: str, *, reason: str) -> None:
+    assets = await warm_pool_assets_repo.get_assets(uid)
+    if assets:
+        if assets.get("asset_status") == "discarded":
+            await warm_pool_repo.mark_discarded(uid, _now_ts(), error=reason)
+            return
+        bot = get_first_asset_bot(assets)
+        app_token = _app_token_from_assets(assets)
+        if bot and bot.get("bot_id") and app_token:
+            client = get_openclaw_client()
+            try:
+                await client.stop_bot(bot["bot_id"], app_token=app_token)
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+            try:
+                await client.delete_bot(bot["bot_id"], app_token=app_token)
+            except Exception as exc:
+                raise RuntimeError(f"failed to delete pack test bot {bot['bot_id']}") from exc
+        await warm_pool_assets_repo.mark_discarded(uid, _now_ts())
+    await warm_pool_repo.mark_discarded(uid, _now_ts(), error=reason)
+
+
+async def cleanup_test_run(org_id: str, test_run_id: str, *, reason: str) -> None:
+    run = await pack_test_run_repo.get_by_id(org_id, test_run_id)
+    if run is None:
+        return
+    now = _now()
+    await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+        org_id,
+        test_run_id,
+        {"status": "cleanup_pending", "cleanup_started_at": now, "cleanup_error": None, "updated_at": now},
+    )
+    cleanup_errors: list[str] = []
+    try:
+        await _cleanup_materialized_runtime(run)
+    except Exception as exc:
+        logger.warning("[PACK_TEST] Failed to hide temp runtime for test_run_id=%s: %s", test_run_id, exc)
+        cleanup_errors.append(f"hide runtime: {_failure_summary(exc, max_chars=500)}")
+    if run.temp_uid:
+        try:
+            await _discard_temp_uid(run.temp_uid, reason=reason)
+        except Exception as exc:
+            logger.warning("[PACK_TEST] Failed to discard temp bot for test_run_id=%s: %s", test_run_id, exc)
+            cleanup_errors.append(f"discard bot: {_failure_summary(exc, max_chars=500)}")
+    try:
+        r2_client = get_r2_client()
+        bucket, _domain = r2_client.require_agent_packs_bucket()
+        await r2_client.delete_object(bucket=bucket, key=run.archive_tmp_key)
+    except Exception as exc:
+        logger.warning("[PACK_TEST] Failed to delete temp archive for test_run_id=%s: %s", test_run_id, exc)
+        cleanup_errors.append(f"delete archive: {_failure_summary(exc, max_chars=500)}")
+    if cleanup_errors:
+        cleanup_error = "; ".join(cleanup_errors)
+        await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+            org_id,
+            test_run_id,
+            {"cleanup_error": cleanup_error[:1000], "updated_at": _now()},
+        )
+        raise RuntimeError(cleanup_error)
+    await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+        org_id,
+        test_run_id,
+        {"status": "cleaned", "cleaned_at": _now(), "cleanup_error": None, "updated_at": _now()},
+    )
+
+
+async def request_test_run_cleanup(org_id: str, test_run_id: str, *, reason: str) -> None:
+    """Mark a test run for cron cleanup and hide it from the creator's chat surface."""
+    run = await pack_test_run_repo.get_by_id(org_id, test_run_id)
+    if run is None:
+        return
+    now = _now()
+    await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+        org_id,
+        test_run_id,
+        {"status": "cleanup_pending", "cleanup_started_at": now, "cleanup_error": None, "updated_at": now},
+    )
+    try:
+        await _cleanup_materialized_runtime(run)
+    except Exception as exc:
+        logger.warning("[PACK_TEST] Failed to hide temp runtime for test_run_id=%s: %s", test_run_id, exc)
+        await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+            org_id,
+            test_run_id,
+            {"cleanup_error": f"hide runtime: {_failure_summary(exc, max_chars=500)}", "updated_at": _now()},
+        )
+        raise
+
+
+async def cleanup_expired_test_runs(batch_limit: int) -> CronResult:
+    result = CronResult()
+    now = _now()
+    due_runs = await pack_test_run_repo.list_cleanup_due(now, batch_limit)
+    for run in due_runs:
+        try:
+            if run.status in {"ready_for_preview", "previewing"}:
+                await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+                    run.org_id,
+                    run.test_run_id,
+                    {
+                        "status": "timed_out",
+                        "failure_code": "preview_timed_out",
+                        "failure_summary": "Pack Test preview timed out",
+                        "updated_at": now,
+                    },
+                )
+                if _as_utc(run.cleanup_after) > now:
+                    result.processed_count += 1
+                    continue
+            cleanup_reason = run.failure_code or ("submitted" if run.submission_id else "pack_test_cleanup")
+            await cleanup_test_run(run.org_id, run.test_run_id, reason=cleanup_reason)
+            result.processed_count += 1
+        except Exception as exc:
+            logger.exception("[PACK_TEST] Cleanup failed for test_run_id=%s", run.test_run_id)
+            await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+                run.org_id,
+                run.test_run_id,
+                {"cleanup_error": str(exc)[:500], "updated_at": _now()},
+            )
+            result.failed_count += 1
+    return result

+

+

+
+from app.database import (

+)

+from app.schema.pack_test import PackTestRun
+from app.schema.warm_pool import WarmPoolEntry
+from app.services.account_service_warm_pool import mark_pool_unready
+from app.services.billing import ensure_billing_initialized
+from app.services.computer._projectors import project_mm_runtime
+from app.services.computer.agent_install_pack import build_pack_archive_source
+from app.services.computer.agent_install_service import deploy_official_agent_pack_archive
+from app.services.litellm_keys import get_litellm_api_key
+from app.services.openclaw.bot_lifecycle import get_first_asset_bot
+from app.services.openclaw_client import get_openclaw_client
+from app.services.pack_store import pack_test_cleanup_service
+from app.services.pack_store.pack_test_cleanup_service import _discard_temp_uid, _failure_summary
+from app.services.warm_pool_provisioner import provision_one_for_immediate_claim
+from app.settings import SETTINGS
+
+logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
+
+_ACCOUNT_BUSINESS = "ecap"
+# The deploy script maps this main-agent link path to /workspace/main.
+# Passing /home/node/.openclaw/workspace would clean the symlink itself and
+# miss the runtime workspace used by OpenClaw's main session.
+_MAIN_WORKSPACE_DIR = "/home/node/.openclaw/workspace-main"
+_BOT_READY_AFTER_PATCH_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 180
+_BOT_READY_AFTER_PATCH_POLL_SECONDS = 2
+_BOT_READY_AFTER_PATCH_STABLE_POLLS = 2
+_MAX_TEMP_ENTRY_CLAIM_ATTEMPTS = 5
+PREVIEW_TTL = timedelta(hours=2)
+
+
+def _now() -> datetime:
+    return datetime.now(UTC)
+
+
+def _now_ts() -> int:
+    return int(time.time())
+
+
+def _app_token_from_assets(assets: dict) -> str:
+    app_token = str(assets.get("app_token") or "").strip()
+    if app_token:
+        return app_token
+    app = assets.get("openclaw_app")
+    if isinstance(app, dict):
+        return str(app.get("api_token") or "").strip()
+    return ""
+
+
+def _main_mattermost_bot(bot: dict) -> dict | None:
+    bots = bot.get("mattermost_bots") or []
+    return next((item for item in bots if item.get("agent_id") == "main"), bots[0] if bots else None)
+
+
+def _asset_bot_by_id(assets: dict, bot_id: str) -> dict | None:
+    bots = assets.get("openclaw_bots") or []
+    if not isinstance(bots, list):
+        return None
+    return next((bot for bot in bots if isinstance(bot, dict) and bot.get("bot_id") == bot_id), None)
+
+
+async def _creator_billing_key(uid: str) -> str:
+    account = await user_repo.get_user(uid)
+    user = account.model_dump() if account else {"uid": uid}
+    user = await ensure_billing_initialized(user, allow_terminal_subscription_bootstrap=True)
+    billing_key = get_litellm_api_key(user)
+    if not billing_key:
+        raise RuntimeError("pack test creator billing_key is missing")
+    return billing_key
+
+
+def _billing_runtime_patch(billing_key: str, *, user_internal_token: str | None = None) -> tuple[dict, dict]:
+    config = {
+        "models": {
+            "providers": {
+                "openai": {"apiKey": billing_key},
+                "xai": {"apiKey": billing_key},
+            }
+        },
+        "agents": {
+            "defaults": {
+                "memorySearch": {
+                    "remote": {
+                        "apiKey": billing_key,
+                    }
+                }
+            }
+        },
+    }
+    deployment_env = {
+        "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY": billing_key,
+        "OPENAI_API_KEY": billing_key,
+        "GEMINI_API_KEY": billing_key,
+        "XAI_API_KEY": billing_key,
+        "LITELLM_API_KEY": billing_key,
+    }
+    if user_internal_token:
+        deployment_env["USER_INTERNAL_TOKEN"] = user_internal_token
+    return config, {"env": deployment_env}
+
+
+async def _patch_bot_runtime_env(
+    bot_id: str,
+    app_token: str,
+    billing_key: str,
+    *,
+    user_internal_token: str | None,
+) -> None:
+    config, deployment = _billing_runtime_patch(billing_key, user_internal_token=user_internal_token)
+    await get_openclaw_client().update_bot_config(bot_id, app_token=app_token, config=config, deployment=deployment)
+
+
+def _deployment_ready(bot_data: dict) -> bool:
+    deployment_status = bot_data.get("deployment_status")
+    if not isinstance(deployment_status, dict):
+        return True
+    status = str(deployment_status.get("status") or "").strip().lower()
+    return not status or status in {"ready", "available", "complete", "completed", "succeeded"}
+
+
+async def _wait_for_bot_ready_after_patch(
+    bot_id: str,
+    app_token: str,
+    *,
+    timeout_seconds: int = _BOT_READY_AFTER_PATCH_TIMEOUT_SECONDS,
+    poll_interval_seconds: float = _BOT_READY_AFTER_PATCH_POLL_SECONDS,
+) -> None:
+    client = get_openclaw_client()
+    deadline = time.monotonic() + timeout_seconds
+    consecutive_ready = 0
+    last_state: dict[str, object] = {}
+
+    while True:
+        bot_data = await client.get_bot(bot_id, app_token=app_token)
+        deploy_ready = _deployment_ready(bot_data)
+        status_info: dict = {}
+        runtime_ready = False
+        if deploy_ready:
+            status_info = await client.get_bot_status(bot_id, app_token=app_token)
+            runtime_ready = bool(status_info.get("ready"))
+
+        if deploy_ready and runtime_ready:
+            consecutive_ready += 1
+            if consecutive_ready >= _BOT_READY_AFTER_PATCH_STABLE_POLLS:
+                return
+        else:
+            consecutive_ready = 0
+
+        deployment_status = bot_data.get("deployment_status") if isinstance(bot_data, dict) else None
+        last_state = {
+            "deployment_status": deployment_status.get("status") if isinstance(deployment_status, dict) else None,
+            "runtime_status": status_info.get("status") if status_info else None,
+            "phase": status_info.get("phase") if status_info else None,
+        }
+        if time.monotonic() >= deadline:
+            raise RuntimeError(f"pack test bot did not become ready after runtime env patch: {last_state}")
+        await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_seconds)
+
+
+async def _materialize_pack_test_runtime(
+    run: PackTestRun,
+    bot: dict,
+    mm_bot: dict,
+    *,
+    status: str,
+    preview_expires_at: datetime | None = None,
+) -> None:
+    bot_id = str(bot.get("bot_id") or "")
+    if not bot_id:
+        raise RuntimeError("pack test bot_id missing during materialization")
+    now_iso = _now().isoformat()
+    computer = ZooClawComputer(
+        computer_id=bot_id,
+        uid=run.created_by_uid,
+        org_id=run.org_id,
+        computer_name=f"Pack Test: {run.pack_name}",
+        status=bot.get("status") or "ready",
+        ws_url=bot.get("ws_url") or "",
+        webchat_url=bot.get("webchat_url") or "",
+        token=bot.get("token") or bot.get("access_token") or "",
+        model_config_set=bot.get("model_config_set"),
+        phase=bot.get("phase") or "",
+        diagnostic_message=bot.get("diagnostic_message") or "",
+        source="pack_test",
+        pack_test_run_id=run.test_run_id,
+        pack_test_status=status,
+        pack_test_expires_at=preview_expires_at.isoformat() if preview_expires_at else None,
+        created_at=bot.get("created_at") or now_iso,
+        updated_at=now_iso,
+    )
+    await computer_repo.upsert(computer)
+
+    workspace = AgentWorkspace(
+        workspace_id=f"pack_test:{run.test_run_id}:main",
+        agent_id="main",
+        computer_id=bot_id,
+        uid=run.created_by_uid,
+        org_id=run.org_id,
+        name=run.pack_name,
+        source="pack_test",
+        status="active",
+        pack_id=None,
+        submission_id=None,
+        mattermost=project_mm_runtime({**mm_bot, "display_name": run.pack_name, "enabled": True}),
+        created_at=mm_bot.get("created_at") or now_iso,
+        updated_at=now_iso,
+    )
+    await agent_workspace_repo.upsert_install_state(workspace)
+
+
+async def _claim_temp_entry():
+    now = _now_ts()
+    entry = await warm_pool_repo.claim_one_ready(now)
+    if entry is None:
+        provisioned = await provision_one_for_immediate_claim()
+        if provisioned is not None:
+            entry = await warm_pool_repo.claim_one_ready(_now_ts())

+
+async def _claim_temp_runtime() -> tuple[WarmPoolEntry, dict, str, dict] | None:
+    for _attempt in range(_MAX_TEMP_ENTRY_CLAIM_ATTEMPTS):
+        entry = await _claim_temp_entry()

+async def _load_existing_runtime(run: PackTestRun) -> tuple[dict, str, dict] | None:

+            run.temp_bot_id or run.temp_computer_id,

+        return None
+    mm_user = assets.get("mattermost_user") if isinstance(assets.get("mattermost_user"), dict) else {}

+    if not mm_user or not mm_bot:
+        logger.warning(
+            "[PACK_TEST] Existing runtime assets missing Mattermost assets - test_run_id=%s temp_uid=%s",
+            run.test_run_id,
+            run.temp_uid,

+        return None

+
+

+            to_status="bot_allocating",

+        if transitioned is None:

+                    "temp_computer_id": bot["bot_id"],
+                    "temp_agent_id": "main",
+                    "temp_mm_channel_id": mm_bot.get("dm_channel_id"),
+                    "temp_mm_bot_user_id": mm_bot.get("bot_user_id"),
+                }
+            )
+        transitioned = await pack_test_run_repo.transition_status(
+            org_id=run.org_id,
+            test_run_id=run.test_run_id,
+            from_statuses={"bot_allocating"},
+            to_status="installing",
+            fields=install_fields,
+        )
+        if transitioned is None:
+            if entry is not None:
+                await _discard_temp_uid(entry.uid, reason="pack_test_install_cancelled")
+            return
+        run = transitioned
+
+        billing_key = await _creator_billing_key(run.created_by_uid)
+        await _patch_bot_runtime_env(
+            bot["bot_id"],
+            app_token,
+            billing_key,
+            user_internal_token=archive_read_token,
+        )
+        await _wait_for_bot_ready_after_patch(bot["bot_id"], app_token)
+        await _materialize_pack_test_runtime(run, bot, mm_bot, status="installing")
+
+        await deploy_official_agent_pack_archive(
+            bot["bot_id"],
+            app_token,
+            "main",
+            _MAIN_WORKSPACE_DIR,
+            build_pack_archive_source(run.display_id, run.archive_tmp_key),
+            archive_read_token=archive_read_token,
+            overwrite_mode="clean",
+        )
+
+        await get_openclaw_client().restart_bot(bot["bot_id"], app_token=app_token)
+
+        preview_base = SETTINGS.APP_FRONTEND_URL or SETTINGS.APP_PUBLIC_URL
+        preview_url = (
+            f"{preview_base.rstrip('/')}/chat?computer_id={bot['bot_id']}&agent_id=main" if preview_base else None
+        )
+        preview_expires_at = _now() + PREVIEW_TTL
+        transitioned = await pack_test_run_repo.transition_status(
+            org_id=run.org_id,
+            test_run_id=run.test_run_id,
+            from_statuses={"installing"},
+            to_status="ready_for_preview",
+            fields={

+

+"""Pack Test Run workflow and submission gate checks."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import logging
+from datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta
+from typing import Any
+from uuid import uuid4
+
+from app.database import computer_repo, pack_test_run_repo, warm_pool_assets_repo
+from app.errors import ConflictError, DomainValidationError, NotFoundError, UnauthorizedError
+from app.schema.pack_test import (
+    PackAssetPromoteResponse,
+    PackTestPreviewSession,
+    PackTestRun,
+    PackTestRunCreateResponse,
+)
+from app.services.pack_store import pack_test_submission_service
+from app.services.pack_store.archive_service import UploadedArchiveReference
+from app.services.pack_store.pack_test_runtime_service import PREVIEW_TTL
+
+logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
+
+_CLEANUP_TTL = timedelta(hours=24)
+_SUPERSEDE_CANDIDATE_STATUSES = {
+    "created",
+    "asset_received",
+    "bot_allocating",
+    "installing",
+    "ready_for_preview",
+    "previewing",
+    "accepted",
+    "timed_out",
+}
+_RUNTIME_REUSE_STATUSES = {"ready_for_preview", "previewing", "timed_out"}
+_RUNTIME_FIELD_NAMES = (
+    "temp_uid",
+    "temp_bot_id",
+    "temp_computer_id",
+    "temp_agent_id",
+    "temp_mm_channel_id",
+    "temp_mm_bot_user_id",
+)
+
+
+def _now() -> datetime:
+    return datetime.now(UTC)
+
+
+def _as_utc(value: datetime | None) -> datetime | None:
+    if value is None:
+        return None
+    if value.tzinfo is None or value.tzinfo.utcoffset(value) is None:
+        return value.replace(tzinfo=UTC)
+    return value.astimezone(UTC)
+
+
+def _create_response(
+    run: PackTestRun, *, reused: bool, superseded_test_run_ids: list[str] | None = None
+) -> PackTestRunCreateResponse:
+    return PackTestRunCreateResponse(
+        test_run_id=run.test_run_id,
+        org_id=run.org_id,
+        status=run.status,
+        archive_sha256=run.archive_sha256,
+        preview_url=run.preview_url,
+        created_at=run.created_at,
+        reused=reused,
+        superseded_test_run_ids=superseded_test_run_ids or [],
+    )
+
+
+async def _sync_pack_test_computer_status(run: PackTestRun, status: str, *, expires_at: datetime | None = None) -> None:
+    if not run.temp_computer_id:
+        return
+    fields: dict[str, object] = {"pack_test_status": status, "updated_at": _now().isoformat()}
+    expires_at_utc = _as_utc(expires_at)
+    if expires_at_utc is not None:
+        fields["pack_test_expires_at"] = expires_at_utc.isoformat()
+    await computer_repo.update_fields(run.created_by_uid, run.org_id, run.temp_computer_id, fields)
+
+
+async def _supersede_prior_candidates(
+    *,
+    org_id: str,
+    created_by_uid: str,
+    pack_name: str,
+    display_id: str,
+    pack_version: str,
+    exclude_test_run_id: str,
+    prior_runs: list[PackTestRun],
+    preserve_runtime_from_test_run_id: str | None,
+    now: datetime,
+) -> list[str]:
+    superseded: list[str] = []
+    for prior in prior_runs:
+        if prior.test_run_id == exclude_test_run_id:
+            continue
+        if prior.status not in _SUPERSEDE_CANDIDATE_STATUSES:
+            continue
+        fields: dict[str, Any] = {
+            "status": "cleanup_pending",
+            "failure_code": "superseded_by_new_upload",
+            "failure_summary": "A newer Pack Test upload superseded this test run",
+            "cleanup_started_at": now,
+            "updated_at": now,
+        }
+        if prior.test_run_id == preserve_runtime_from_test_run_id:
+            fields.update(dict.fromkeys(_RUNTIME_FIELD_NAMES))
+        await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+            prior.org_id,
+            prior.test_run_id,
+            fields,
+        )
+        superseded.append(prior.test_run_id)
+    return superseded
+
+
+def _runtime_fields(run: PackTestRun) -> dict[str, str | None]:
+    return {name: getattr(run, name) for name in _RUNTIME_FIELD_NAMES}
+
+
+def _restore_runtime_owner_fields(run: PackTestRun, now: datetime) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    return {
+        "status": run.status,
+        "failure_code": run.failure_code,
+        "failure_summary": run.failure_summary,
+        "cleanup_started_at": run.cleanup_started_at,
+        "updated_at": now,
+        **_runtime_fields(run),
+    }
+
+
+def _has_reusable_runtime(run: PackTestRun, now: datetime) -> bool:
+    cleanup_after = _as_utc(run.cleanup_after)
+    return (
+        run.status in _RUNTIME_REUSE_STATUSES
+        and cleanup_after is not None
+        and cleanup_after > now
+        and bool(run.temp_uid)
+        and bool(run.temp_bot_id)
+        and bool(run.temp_computer_id)
+        and bool(run.temp_mm_channel_id)
+        and bool(run.temp_mm_bot_user_id)
+    )
+
+
+def _find_reusable_runtime(prior_runs: list[PackTestRun], now: datetime) -> PackTestRun | None:
+    return next((run for run in prior_runs if _has_reusable_runtime(run, now)), None)
+
+
+async def create_test_run(
+    *,
+    org_id: str,
+    created_by_uid: str,
+    pack_name: str,
+    display_id: str,
+    pack_version: str,
+    listing_metadata: dict[str, Any],
+    quick_commands: list[dict[str, Any]],
+    smoke_scenarios: list[dict[str, Any]],
+    archive: UploadedArchiveReference,
+) -> PackTestRunCreateResponse:
+    now = _now()
+    test_run_id = f"ptr_{uuid4().hex}"
+    prior_runs = await pack_test_run_repo.list_by_candidate(
+        org_id=org_id,
+        created_by_uid=created_by_uid,
+        pack_name=pack_name,
+        display_id=display_id,
+        pack_version=pack_version,
+    )
+    reusable_runtime_candidate = _find_reusable_runtime(prior_runs, now)
+    run = PackTestRun(
+        test_run_id=test_run_id,
+        org_id=org_id,
+        created_by_uid=created_by_uid,
+        pack_name=pack_name,
+        display_id=display_id,
+        pack_version=pack_version,
+        listing_metadata=listing_metadata,
+        quick_commands=quick_commands,
+        smoke_scenarios=smoke_scenarios,
+        archive_tmp_key=archive.archive_key,
+        archive_name=archive.archive_name,
+        archive_ext=archive.archive_ext,
+        archive_size=archive.size,
+        archive_sha256=archive.sha256,
+        archive_content_type=archive.content_type,
+        status="asset_received",
+        cleanup_after=now + _CLEANUP_TTL,
+        created_at=now,
+        updated_at=now,
+    )
+    await pack_test_run_repo.create(run)
+    reusable_runtime = (
+        await pack_test_run_repo.claim_reusable_runtime(
+            org_id=org_id,
+            created_by_uid=created_by_uid,
+            pack_name=pack_name,
+            display_id=display_id,
+            pack_version=pack_version,
+            now=now,
+            cleanup_started_at=now,
+        )
+        if reusable_runtime_candidate
+        else None
+    )
+    if reusable_runtime:
+        runtime_fields = _runtime_fields(reusable_runtime)
+        try:
+            modified_count = await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+                org_id,
+                test_run_id,
+                {**runtime_fields, "updated_at": now},
+            )
+            if modified_count == 0:
+                raise RuntimeError("pack test run disappeared while transferring reusable runtime")
+        except Exception:
+            logger.exception("[PACK_TEST] Failed to attach reusable runtime to new test run")
+            await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+                reusable_runtime.org_id,
+                reusable_runtime.test_run_id,
+                _restore_runtime_owner_fields(reusable_runtime, now),
+            )
+            raise
+        run = run.model_copy(update={**runtime_fields, "updated_at": now})
+    superseded_test_run_ids = await _supersede_prior_candidates(
+        org_id=org_id,
+        created_by_uid=created_by_uid,
+        pack_name=pack_name,
+        display_id=display_id,
+        pack_version=pack_version,
+        exclude_test_run_id=test_run_id,
+        prior_runs=prior_runs,
+        preserve_runtime_from_test_run_id=None,
+        now=now,
+    )
+    if reusable_runtime and reusable_runtime.test_run_id not in superseded_test_run_ids:
+        superseded_test_run_ids.insert(0, reusable_runtime.test_run_id)
+    return _create_response(run, reused=False, superseded_test_run_ids=superseded_test_run_ids)
+
+
+async def get_test_run(*, org_id: str, test_run_id: str, requester_uid: str) -> PackTestRun:
+    run = await pack_test_run_repo.get_by_id(org_id, test_run_id)
+    if run is None:
+        raise NotFoundError(
+            code="pack_test.not_found",
+            detail="Pack test run not found",
+            context={"org_id": org_id, "test_run_id": test_run_id},
+        )
+    if run.created_by_uid != requester_uid:
+        raise UnauthorizedError(
+            code="pack_test.creator_only",
+            detail="Pack test run is only available to its creator",
+            context={"org_id": org_id, "test_run_id": test_run_id, "forbidden": True},
+        )
+    return run
+
+
+def _main_mm_bot(bot: dict) -> dict | None:
+    bots = bot.get("mattermost_bots") or []
+    return next((item for item in bots if item.get("agent_id") == "main"), bots[0] if bots else None)
+
+
+def _asset_bot_by_id(assets: dict, bot_id: str | None) -> dict | None:
+    bots = assets.get("openclaw_bots") or []
+    if not isinstance(bots, list) or not bot_id:
+        return None
+    return next((bot for bot in bots if isinstance(bot, dict) and bot.get("bot_id") == bot_id), None)
+
+
+async def get_preview_session(*, org_id: str, test_run_id: str, requester_uid: str) -> PackTestPreviewSession:
+    run = await get_test_run(org_id=org_id, test_run_id=test_run_id, requester_uid=requester_uid)
+    if run.status not in {"ready_for_preview", "previewing", "accepted"}:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.preview_not_ready",
+            detail="Pack test preview is not ready",
+            context={"status": run.status},
+        )
+    now = _now()
+    preview_expires_at = _as_utc(run.preview_expires_at)
+    if run.status != "accepted" and (preview_expires_at is None or preview_expires_at <= now):
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.preview_expired",
+            detail="Pack test preview has expired",
+            context={"test_run_id": test_run_id},
+        )
+    if not run.temp_uid:
+        raise DomainValidationError(code="pack_test.preview_missing_runtime", detail="Preview runtime is missing")
+
+    assets = await warm_pool_assets_repo.get_assets(run.temp_uid)
+    if not assets:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.preview_missing_runtime", detail="Preview runtime assets are missing"
+        )
+    mm_user = assets.get("mattermost_user") if isinstance(assets.get("mattermost_user"), dict) else {}
+    bot = _asset_bot_by_id(assets, run.temp_bot_id or run.temp_computer_id) or {}
+    mm_bot = _main_mm_bot(bot)
+    if not mm_user or not mm_bot:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.preview_missing_runtime", detail="Mattermost preview assets are missing"
+        )
+
+    if run.status == "ready_for_preview":
+        await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(org_id, test_run_id, {"status": "previewing", "updated_at": now})
+        run = run.model_copy(update={"status": "previewing", "updated_at": now})
+
+    expires_at = preview_expires_at or now + PREVIEW_TTL
+    await _sync_pack_test_computer_status(run, run.status, expires_at=expires_at)
+    return PackTestPreviewSession(
+        test_run_id=test_run_id,
+        token=str(mm_user.get("user_token") or ""),
+        user_id=str(mm_user.get("user_id") or ""),
+        channel_id=str(mm_bot.get("dm_channel_id") or run.temp_mm_channel_id or ""),
+        agent_id="main",
+        bot_user_id=str(mm_bot.get("bot_user_id") or run.temp_mm_bot_user_id or ""),
+        bot_name=run.pack_name,
+        expires_at=expires_at,
+    )
+
+
+async def accept_test_run(*, org_id: str, test_run_id: str, requester_uid: str, note: str | None) -> PackTestRun:
+    run = await get_test_run(org_id=org_id, test_run_id=test_run_id, requester_uid=requester_uid)
+    if run.status not in {"ready_for_preview", "previewing"}:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.accept_invalid_status",
+            detail="Pack test run must be ready or previewing before acceptance",
+            context={"status": run.status},
+        )
+    now = _now()
+    updated = await pack_test_run_repo.transition_status(
+        org_id=org_id,
+        test_run_id=test_run_id,
+        from_statuses={"ready_for_preview", "previewing"},
+        to_status="accepted",
+        fields={"accepted_at": now, "accepted_by_uid": requester_uid, "acceptance_note": note, "updated_at": now},
+    )
+    if updated is None:
+        raise ConflictError(code="pack_test.accept_conflict", detail="Pack test run status changed")
+    await _sync_pack_test_computer_status(updated, "accepted", expires_at=updated.preview_expires_at)
+    return updated
+
+
+async def extend_preview(*, org_id: str, test_run_id: str, requester_uid: str) -> PackTestRun:
+    run = await get_test_run(org_id=org_id, test_run_id=test_run_id, requester_uid=requester_uid)
+    if run.status not in {"ready_for_preview", "previewing"}:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.extend_invalid_status",
+            detail="Pack test run must be ready or previewing before extension",
+            context={"status": run.status},
+        )
+    if run.preview_extended_count >= 1:
+        raise DomainValidationError(code="pack_test.preview_extension_used", detail="Preview can only be extended once")
+    now = _now()
+    current_expires_at = _as_utc(run.preview_expires_at)
+    extension_base = current_expires_at if current_expires_at is not None and current_expires_at > now else now
+    preview_expires_at = extension_base + PREVIEW_TTL
+    updated = await pack_test_run_repo.transition_status(
+        org_id=org_id,
+        test_run_id=test_run_id,
+        from_statuses={"ready_for_preview", "previewing"},
+        to_status=run.status,
+        fields={
+            "preview_expires_at": preview_expires_at,
+            "preview_extended_count": run.preview_extended_count + 1,
+            "updated_at": now,
+        },
+    )
+    if updated is None:
+        raise ConflictError(code="pack_test.extend_conflict", detail="Pack test run status changed")
+    await _sync_pack_test_computer_status(updated, updated.status, expires_at=updated.preview_expires_at)
+    return updated
+

+"""Promotion and submission gate checks for Pack Test runs."""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import logging
+from datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta
+from typing import Any
+from uuid import uuid4
+
+from app.database import pack_asset_repo, pack_repo, pack_test_run_repo
+from app.database._errors import is_duplicate_key_error
+from app.errors import DomainValidationError, NotFoundError, UnauthorizedError
+from app.schema.pack_test import PackAsset, PackAssetPromoteResponse, PackTestRun
+from app.services.pack_store.pack_test_runtime_service import request_test_run_cleanup
+from app.services.r2_storage import get_r2_client
+
+logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
+_PROMOTE_TTL = timedelta(days=7)
+
+
+def _now() -> datetime:
+    return datetime.now(UTC)
+
+
+def _as_utc(value: datetime | None) -> datetime | None:
+    if value is None:
+        return None
+    if value.tzinfo is None or value.tzinfo.utcoffset(value) is None:
+        return value.replace(tzinfo=UTC)
+    return value.astimezone(UTC)
+
+
+async def _get_test_run(*, org_id: str, test_run_id: str, requester_uid: str) -> PackTestRun:
+    run = await pack_test_run_repo.get_by_id(org_id, test_run_id)
+    if run is None:
+        raise NotFoundError(
+            code="pack_test.not_found",
+            detail="Pack test run not found",
+            context={"org_id": org_id, "test_run_id": test_run_id},
+        )
+    if run.created_by_uid != requester_uid:
+        raise UnauthorizedError(
+            code="pack_test.creator_only",
+            detail="Pack test run is only available to its creator",
+            context={"org_id": org_id, "test_run_id": test_run_id, "forbidden": True},
+        )
+    return run
+
+
+def _ensure_run_matches_pack(run: PackTestRun, pack: Any) -> None:
+    if run.display_id != pack.display_id or run.pack_name != pack.pack_name:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.pack_mismatch",
+            detail="Pack test run does not match the target pack",
+            context={
+                "test_run_id": run.test_run_id,
+                "run_display_id": run.display_id,
+                "pack_display_id": pack.display_id,
+                "run_pack_name": run.pack_name,
+                "pack_name": pack.pack_name,
+            },
+        )
+
+
+async def promote_test_run_asset(
+    *,
+    org_id: str,
+    pack_id: str,
+    test_run_id: str,
+    requester_uid: str,
+) -> PackAssetPromoteResponse:
+    pack = await pack_repo.get_by_id(org_id, pack_id)
+    if pack is None:
+        raise NotFoundError(
+            code="pack.not_found", detail="Pack not found", context={"org_id": org_id, "pack_id": pack_id}
+        )
+
+    run = await _get_test_run(org_id=org_id, test_run_id=test_run_id, requester_uid=requester_uid)
+    _ensure_run_matches_pack(run, pack)
+    if run.status not in {"accepted", "promoted"}:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.promote_invalid_status",
+            detail="Pack test run must be accepted before promotion",
+            context={"status": run.status},
+        )
+    accepted_at = _as_utc(run.accepted_at)
+    if accepted_at and accepted_at + _PROMOTE_TTL < _now():
+        raise DomainValidationError(code="pack_test.promote_expired", detail="Pack test run is too old to promote")
+
+    existing = await pack_asset_repo.get_by_source_test_run(test_run_id)
+    if existing is not None:
+        now = _now()
+        await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+            org_id,
+            test_run_id,
+            {"status": "promoted", "promoted_asset_id": existing.asset_id, "updated_at": now},
+        )
+        return PackAssetPromoteResponse(
+            asset_id=existing.asset_id,
+            archive_sha256=existing.archive_sha256,
+            source_test_run_id=existing.source_test_run_id,
+        )
+
+    storage_key = f"{org_id}/{pack_id}/{uuid4().hex}{run.archive_ext}"
+    r2_client = get_r2_client()
+    bucket, _domain = r2_client.require_agent_packs_bucket()
+    await r2_client.copy_object(bucket=bucket, source_key=run.archive_tmp_key, destination_key=storage_key)
+
+    now = _now()
+    asset = PackAsset(
+        asset_id=storage_key,
+        org_id=org_id,
+        pack_id=pack_id,
+        source_test_run_id=test_run_id,
+        storage_key=storage_key,
+        archive_name=run.archive_name,
+        archive_ext=run.archive_ext,
+        archive_size=run.archive_size,
+        archive_sha256=run.archive_sha256,
+        content_type=run.archive_content_type,
+        status="active",
+        created_by_uid=requester_uid,
+        created_at=now,
+    )
+    try:
+        await pack_asset_repo.create(asset)
+    except Exception as exc:
+        if is_duplicate_key_error(exc):
+            existing = await pack_asset_repo.get_by_source_test_run(test_run_id)
+            if existing is not None:
+                await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+                    org_id,
+                    test_run_id,
+                    {"status": "promoted", "promoted_asset_id": existing.asset_id, "updated_at": _now()},
+                )
+                return PackAssetPromoteResponse(
+                    asset_id=existing.asset_id,
+                    archive_sha256=existing.archive_sha256,
+                    source_test_run_id=existing.source_test_run_id,
+                )
+        raise
+
+    await pack_test_run_repo.update_fields(
+        org_id,
+        test_run_id,
+        {"status": "promoted", "promoted_asset_id": asset.asset_id, "updated_at": now},
+    )
+    return PackAssetPromoteResponse(
+        asset_id=asset.asset_id,
+        archive_sha256=asset.archive_sha256,
+        source_test_run_id=asset.source_test_run_id,
+    )
+
+
+async def validate_submission_gate(
+    *,
+    org_id: str,
+    pack_id: str,
+    asset_id: str,
+    test_run_id: str,
+    expected_pack_name: str,
+    expected_display_id: str,
+    expected_pack_version: str,
+) -> None:
+    asset = await pack_asset_repo.get_by_id(asset_id)
+    if asset is None or asset.status != "active":
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack.asset_not_found",
+            detail="Submitted pack asset does not exist",
+            context={"asset_id": asset_id},
+        )
+    if asset.org_id != org_id or asset.pack_id != pack_id:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack.asset_scope_mismatch",
+            detail="Submitted pack asset does not belong to this pack",
+            context={"org_id": org_id, "pack_id": pack_id, "asset_id": asset_id},
+        )
+    if asset.source_test_run_id != test_run_id:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack.asset_test_run_mismatch",
+            detail="Submitted pack asset was not promoted from this test run",
+            context={"asset_id": asset_id, "test_run_id": test_run_id},
+        )
+    run = await pack_test_run_repo.get_by_id(org_id, test_run_id)
+    if run is None or run.status not in {"accepted", "promoted"}:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack.test_run_not_accepted",
+            detail="Pack version must be submitted from an accepted test run",
+            context={"test_run_id": test_run_id},
+        )
+    if run.pack_name != expected_pack_name or run.display_id != expected_display_id:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.pack_mismatch",
+            detail="Pack version must be submitted from a test run for the same pack",
+            context={
+                "test_run_id": test_run_id,
+                "run_pack_name": run.pack_name,
+                "pack_name": expected_pack_name,
+                "run_display_id": run.display_id,
+                "display_id": expected_display_id,
+            },
+        )
+    if run.pack_version != expected_pack_version:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack_test.version_mismatch",
+            detail="Pack version must match the accepted test run version",
+            context={
+                "test_run_id": test_run_id,
+                "run_pack_version": run.pack_version,
+                "pack_version": expected_pack_version,
+            },
+        )
+    if run.archive_sha256 != asset.archive_sha256:
+        raise DomainValidationError(
+            code="pack.asset_hash_mismatch",
+            detail="Pack asset hash does not match accepted test run",
+            context={"asset_id": asset_id, "test_run_id": test_run_id},
+        )
+
+
+async def attach_submission(*, org_id: str, test_run_id: str, submission_id: str) -> None:
+    await pack_test_run_repo.attach_submission(org_id, test_run_id, submission_id, _now())
+    try:
+        await request_test_run_cleanup(org_id, test_run_id, reason="submitted")
+    except Exception as exc:
+        logger.warning("[PACK_TEST] Cleanup request after submission failed for test_run_id=%s: %s", test_run_id, exc)

+def test_official_agent_pack_deploy_script_remote_url_prefers_archive_read_token(
+    tmp_path: Path,
+    monkeypatch: pytest.MonkeyPatch,
+    capsys: pytest.CaptureFixture[str],
+):
+    archive_bytes = io.BytesIO()
+    with zipfile.ZipFile(archive_bytes, "w") as archive:
+        archive.writestr("workspace/BOOTSTRAP.md", "hello from archive token")
+    archive_payload = archive_bytes.getvalue()
+
+    workspace_dir = tmp_path / "workspace-code_dev"
+    link_path = tmp_path / "openclaw" / "workspace-code_dev"
+    request_headers: list[dict[str, str]] = []
+
+    class FakeResponse:
+        status_code = 200
+        closed = False
+
+        def raise_for_status(self) -> None:
+            return None
+
+        def iter_content(self, *, chunk_size: int):
+            assert chunk_size == 1024 * 1024
+            yield archive_payload
+
+        def close(self) -> None:
+            self.closed = True
+
+    response = FakeResponse()
+
+    def fake_get(url: str, *, headers: dict[str, str], timeout: int, stream: bool) -> FakeResponse:
+        assert url == "https://agentpack.example.com/packs/code_dev/archive.zip"
+        assert timeout == 180
+        assert stream is True
+        request_headers.append(headers)
+        return response
+
+    monkeypatch.setattr(requests, "get", fake_get)
+    script = OFFICIAL_AGENT_PACK_DEPLOY_SCRIPT.replace(
+        'Path(f"/home/node/.openclaw/workspace-{agent_id}")',
+        'Path(os.environ["ARCHIVE_LINK_PATH"])',
+    )
+
+    _run_official_agent_pack_deploy_script(
+        {
+            "ARCHIVE_AGENT_ID": "code_dev",
+            "ARCHIVE_SOURCE_TYPE": "remote_url",
+            "ARCHIVE_SOURCE_LOCATOR": "https://agentpack.example.com/packs/code_dev/archive.zip",
+            "ARCHIVE_NAME": "archive.zip",
+            "ARCHIVE_WORKSPACE_DIR": str(workspace_dir),
+            "ARCHIVE_LINK_PATH": str(link_path),
+            "ARCHIVE_READ_TOKEN": "creator-token",
+            "USER_INTERNAL_TOKEN": "temp-bot-token",
+        },
+        script=script,
+    )
+
+    assert request_headers == [{"Authorization": "Bearer creator-token"}]
+    assert response.closed is True
+    assert (workspace_dir / "BOOTSTRAP.md").read_text() == "hello from archive token"
+    assert link_path.is_symlink()
+    assert link_path.readlink() == workspace_dir
+    stderr = capsys.readouterr().err
+    assert "token_source=archive_read_token" in stderr
+    assert "creator-token" not in stderr
+    assert "temp-bot-token" not in stderr
+
+
+def test_official_agent_pack_deploy_script_clean_overwrite_replaces_workspace_contents(tmp_path: Path):
+    archive_path = tmp_path / "pack.zip"
+    with zipfile.ZipFile(archive_path, "w") as archive:
+        archive.writestr("workspace/BOOTSTRAP.md", "new bootstrap")
+        archive.writestr("workspace/agent.py", "print('new')")
+        archive.writestr("workspace/data/fresh.txt", "fresh data")
+
+    workspace_dir = tmp_path / "workspace-main"
+    (workspace_dir / "data").mkdir(parents=True)
+    (workspace_dir / "stale.py").write_text("stale")
+    (workspace_dir / "BOOTSTRAP.md").write_text("old bootstrap")
+    (workspace_dir / "MEMORY.md").write_text("old memory")
+    (workspace_dir / "data" / "old.txt").write_text("old data")
+    link_path = tmp_path / "openclaw" / "workspace-main"
+    script = OFFICIAL_AGENT_PACK_DEPLOY_SCRIPT.replace(
+        'Path(f"/home/node/.openclaw/workspace-{agent_id}")',
+        'Path(os.environ["ARCHIVE_LINK_PATH"])',
+    )
+
+    _run_official_agent_pack_deploy_script(
+        {
+            "ARCHIVE_AGENT_ID": "main",
+            "ARCHIVE_SOURCE_TYPE": "local_path",
+            "ARCHIVE_SOURCE_LOCATOR": str(archive_path),
+            "ARCHIVE_NAME": "pack.zip",
+            "ARCHIVE_WORKSPACE_DIR": str(workspace_dir),
+            "ARCHIVE_LINK_PATH": str(link_path),
+            "ARCHIVE_OVERWRITE_MODE": "clean",
+        },
+        script=script,
+    )
+
+    assert (workspace_dir / "BOOTSTRAP.md").read_text() == "new bootstrap"
+    assert (workspace_dir / "agent.py").read_text() == "print('new')"
+    assert (workspace_dir / "data" / "fresh.txt").read_text() == "fresh data"
+    assert not (workspace_dir / "stale.py").exists()
+    assert not (workspace_dir / "MEMORY.md").exists()
+    assert not (workspace_dir / "data" / "old.txt").exists()
+    assert link_path.is_symlink()
+    assert link_path.readlink() == workspace_dir
+
+
+def test_official_agent_pack_deploy_script_main_link_path_overwrites_runtime_workspace(tmp_path: Path):
+    archive_path = tmp_path / "pack.zip"
+    with zipfile.ZipFile(archive_path, "w") as archive:
+        archive.writestr("workspace/AGENTS.md", "pack agent")
+        archive.writestr("workspace/agent-pack.yaml", "name: pack\nversion: 1.0.0\n")
+
+    runtime_base = tmp_path / "runtime"
+    runtime_workspace = runtime_base / "main"
+    runtime_workspace.mkdir(parents=True)
+    (runtime_workspace / "AGENTS.md").write_text("default agent")
+    (runtime_workspace / "stale.py").write_text("stale")
+    link_path = tmp_path / "openclaw" / "workspace-main"
+    script = OFFICIAL_AGENT_PACK_DEPLOY_SCRIPT.replace(
+        'Path(f"/home/node/.openclaw/workspace-{agent_id}")',
+        'Path(os.environ["ARCHIVE_LINK_PATH"])',
+    ).replace(
+        'Path("/workspace") / agent_id',
+        'Path(os.environ["ARCHIVE_WORKSPACE_ACTUAL_BASE"]) / agent_id',
+    )
+
+    _run_official_agent_pack_deploy_script(
+        {
+            "ARCHIVE_AGENT_ID": "main",
+            "ARCHIVE_SOURCE_TYPE": "local_path",
+            "ARCHIVE_SOURCE_LOCATOR": str(archive_path),
+            "ARCHIVE_NAME": "pack.zip",
+            "ARCHIVE_WORKSPACE_DIR": str(link_path),
+            "ARCHIVE_LINK_PATH": str(link_path),
+            "ARCHIVE_WORKSPACE_ACTUAL_BASE": str(runtime_base),
+            "ARCHIVE_OVERWRITE_MODE": "clean",
+        },
+        script=script,
+    )
+
+    assert (runtime_workspace / "AGENTS.md").read_text() == "pack agent"
+    assert (runtime_workspace / "agent-pack.yaml").is_file()
+    assert not (runtime_workspace / "stale.py").exists()
+    assert link_path.is_symlink()
+    assert link_path.readlink() == runtime_workspace
+
